fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When on, the installed bundle is pushed to the container on the next Apply and the agent's scheduled audits fire. Toggling this is a pure DB write (no container restart).

fields.label: Run As User
fields.description: The Frappe user this agent's runs execute AS: every jarvis__* ERP read is permission-bounded to this user (company scope, role perms), decoupled from the row owner. A non-admin installer may only map the agent to run as themselves; any cross-user mapping needs Jarvis Admin, and binding to a System Manager needs a System Manager. Defaults to the installer.

fields.label: Scoped Visibility
fields.description: Set when the run-as user carries a User Permission on a GL-linked dimension (Account, Cost Center, Project, Fiscal Year, Finance Book, party) other than Company: aggregates this user sees are record-scoped, not the full company GL. Coverage-gated auto-resolve must never fire on a scoped run (A12/A16).

fields.label: Config (JSON)
fields.description: Engagement inputs for this install (benchmark, percentage, engagement_risk_level, company, ...). The delegate reads it on its installation on the next run.

fields.label: Time of day
fields.description: Local time the scheduled audit fires (defaults to 09:00 if unset).

fields.label: Activation State
fields.description: PP-4 — every capability activates per customer in preview/shadow first. In shadow, findings/dashboards are reviewer-visible only and NO clean/compliant attestation renders. Flips to live ONLY via the reviewer promotion path (PP-6 global activation budget gates the flip).

fields.label: Reviewer
fields.description: PP-4 — the named reviewer who sees shadow output and signs off on promotion to live. Backfilled to run_as_user on legacy rows.

fields.label: Promoted By
fields.description: PP-4 — set on promotion to live; must equal reviewer or an authorised approver.

fields.label: Promoted At
fields.description: PP-4 — when the installation was promoted from shadow to live.

fields.label: Installable
fields.description: PP-3 — 0 when a min_apps dependency is unmet / edition ineligible (a NOT-INSTALLABLE install-time state, never a run result). A non-installable capability produces no run and no finding.

fields.label: Not Installable Reason
fields.options:
app_absent_or_ineligible
permission_slice
configuration_missing
record_coverage_insufficient
source_stale
rule_expired
external_evidence_absent
run_truncated_watermark
unsupported_customisation
fields.description: PP-3 — the typed reason (closed enum, mainly app_absent_or_ineligible) when installable == 0. Distinct from any run coverage reason.
